codeReview.summary: Added 75 unit tests (22 FileDropZone, 20 FormatSelector, 33 QualityPreset) covering drag/drop handling, file type detection, format selection, CRF bounds enforcement, and slider interactions. All 245 tests pass, typecheck passes, lint passes with expected warnings for mock 'any' types.

summary: Feature implemented correctly. Worker added tests for the 3 React components that were missing test coverage (FileDropZone, FormatSelector, QualityPreset). Other tests (presets.js, ffmpeg-args.js, output-path.js, SizeEstimation, EncodeProgress, CompletionDisplay) were already present from earlier commits. All 245 tests pass, typecheck passes, lint passes with 15 expected warnings for mock objects using 'any' type.
